name.ja: <ruby>大魔女<rt>ウィッチクラフトマスター</rt></ruby>サンドリヨン

text.en:
"Witchcrafter Madame Verre" + 2 Spellcaster monsters
If this card is Fusion Summoned: You can Special Summon up to 3 Level 7 or lower "Witchcrafter" monsters with different Attributes from each other from your hand and/or Deck, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Fusion Monsters. During your End Phase, if this card is in your GY: You can reveal 1 Spell in your hand; Special Summon this card in Defense Position. You can only use each effect of "Witchcrafter Madame Rilliona" once per turn.
